question: Which zones have a minimum air temperature setpoint sensor in their spaces and what are those zones’ IFC names along with the sensor’s timeseries ID?
How can I retrieve occupancy sensor time series data for every zone in the building?
original_sparql:
PREFIX brick: <https://brickschema.org/schema/1.1/Brick#>
PREFIX as: <https://standards.buildingcontrols.org/ASHRAE/ASHRAE223p/1.0#>

SELECT ?zone ?occupancySensor ?ts ?time ?value
WHERE {
  # Select occupancy sensors
  ?occupancySensor a brick:Occupancy_Sensor .

  # Link sensors to zones using either direct or inverse relationships
  ?occupancySensor (brick:hasLocation|^brick:isLocationOf) ?zone .

  # Retrieve time series data either directly from the sensor or via an associated point
  ?occupancySensor (brick:hasTimeSeries|brick:hasPoint/brick:hasTimeSeries) ?ts .

  # Retrieve timestamp and value from the time series data using Brick or ASHRAE 223p predicates
  ?ts (brick:hasTimestamp|as:hasTimestamp) ?time .
  ?ts (brick:hasValue|as:hasValue) ?value .
}

SELECT DISTINCT ?equipment
WHERE {
  ?equipment a brick:Equipment ;
             brick:isLocatedIn ?zone ;
             brick:hasPoint ?sensor .
  ?zone a brick:Zone .
  {  
    ?sensor a brick:Air_Temperature_Sensor .
  } UNION {
    ?sensor a brick:Temperature_Sensor .
    ?sensor tag:hasTag tag:Air .
  }
}

question: Which VAV units have a point temperature sensor and feed an HVAC zone, and what are the corresponding sensor and zone for each unit?
original_sparql:
PREFIX bacnet: <http://data.ashrae.org/bacnet/2020#>
PREFIX brick: <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick#>
PREFIX bsh: <https://brickschema.org/schema/BrickShape#>
PREFIX dcterms: <http://purl.org/dc/terms/>
PREFIX ns2: <http://buildsys.org/ontologies/bldg11#>
PREFIX ns3: <http://buildsys.org/ontologies/bldg11#bldg11.CHW.Pump1_Start/>
PREFIX ns4: <http://buildsys.org/ontologies/bldg11#bldg11.CHW.Pump2_Start/>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX qudtqk: <http://qudt.org/vocab/quantitykind/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX rec: <https://w3id.org/rec#>
PREFIX ref: <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/ref#>
PREFIX s223: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223#>
PREFIX sdo: <http://schema.org/>
PREFIX sh: <http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#>
PREFIX skos: <http://www.w3.org/2004/02/skos/core#>
PREFIX sosa: <http://www.w3.org/ns/sosa/>
PREFIX tag: <https://brickschema.org/schema/BrickTag#>
PREFIX unit: <http://qudt.org/vocab/unit/>
PREFIX vcard: <http://www.w3.org/2006/vcard/ns#>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?vav ?sensor ?zone
WHERE {
  # Identify VAV units using subclass inference
  ?vav a/rdfs:subClassOf* brick:VAV .

  # Associate the VAV unit with a sensor via common relationships
  ?vav (brick:hasPoint|brick:hasSensor) ?sensor .

  # Ensure the sensor is a Point Temperature Sensor (using subclass reasoning)
  ?sensor a/rdfs:subClassOf* brick:Point_Temperature_Sensor .

  # Connect the VAV unit to an HVAC zone using a flexible property path
  ?vav (brick:feeds|brick:feedsAir|brick:hasZone) ?zone .
  ?zone a/rdfs:subClassOf* brick:HVAC_Zone .
}

question: Which properties associated with building zones (including those linked through room domain spaces and chained connections) are read-only, and what are their labels together with the alc and mpc endpoints in their external references?
original_sparql:
PREFIX bacnet: <http://data.ashrae.org/bacnet/2020#>
PREFIX bob: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223/si-builder#>
PREFIX ex1: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223/data/lbnl-example-2#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX quantitykind: <http://qudt.org/vocab/quantitykind/>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>
PREFIX rdf: <http://www.w3.org/1999/02/22-rdf-syntax-ns#>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX ref: <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/>
PREFIX s223: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223#>
PREFIX sh: <http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#>
PREFIX unit: <http://qudt.org/vocab/unit/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?property ?label ?alc ?mpc
WHERE {
  # Identify building zones using the Brick Schema class
  ?zone a ref:BuildingZone .
  
  # Two cases: property directly attached to zone OR via related spaces (e.g. room domain spaces and chained connections)
  {
    # Direct property attachment via known predicates
    ?zone (ref:hasPoint|ref:hasProperty|ref:hasMeasurement) ?property .
  } UNION {
    # Indirect attachment via one or more hops through room spaces or chained connections
    ?zone (ref:hasRoom|ref:chainedConnection)+ ?intermediate .
    ?intermediate (ref:hasPoint|ref:hasProperty|ref:hasMeasurement) ?property .
  }
  
  # Access information may include datatype or case variations - use a flexible regex match
  ?property s223:access ?access .
  FILTER(regex(str(?access), "read-?only", "i")) .
  
  # Retrieve the property label
  ?property rdfs:label ?label .
  
  # Retrieve external reference details
  ?property s223:externalReference ?extRef .
  ?extRef s223:alcEndpoint ?alc ;
          s223:mpcEndpoint ?mpc .
}

question: Identify each entity that is a zone, and either has a directly associated property or is indirectly connected to a property via a RoomDomainSpace through a chain of connections.
original_sparql:
PREFIX bacnet: <http://data.ashrae.org/bacnet/2020#>
PREFIX bob: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223/si-builder#>
PREFIX ex1: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223/data/lbnl-example-2#>
PREFIX owl: <http://www.w3.org/2002/07/owl#>
PREFIX quantitykind: <http://qudt.org/vocab/quantitykind/>
PREFIX qudt: <http://qudt.org/schema/qudt/>

PREFIX ref: <https://brickschema.org/schema/Brick/>
PREFIX s223: <http://data.ashrae.org/standard223#>
PREFIX sh: <http://www.w3.org/ns/shacl#>
PREFIX unit: <http://qudt.org/vocab/unit/>
PREFIX xsd: <http://www.w3.org/2001/XMLSchema#>

SELECT DISTINCT ?zone ?property
WHERE {
  {
    ?zone rdf:type ref:Zone .
    ?zone ref:hasProperty ?property .
  } UNION {
    ?zone rdf:type ref:Zone .
    ?zone ref:hasRoomDomainSpace+ ?rds .
    ?rds ref:hasProperty ?property .
  }
}
